summary: High‑energy 1992 show with scorching Cassidy > Deal and a fiery Corrina medley, captured on a solid soundboard recording.
review: Fans rave about the over‑driven first‑set transition of Cassidy into Deal and the hot pre‑drums second set that lit up Corrina, even drawing a Beatles comparison. The performance is described as “blown away” and “very HOT,” while the matrix‑style soundboard source is praised as good though listeners note a desire for a fuller matrix mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Three reviews (5, 4, 3 stars) consistently highlight strong musical moments and only minor recording wishes, leading to an overall high rating with confidence from multiple detailed comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear soundboard source; reviewers note it is solid but wish for a matrix mix to capture more ambience. No major clarity or dropout issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as fun and then over‑driven into Cassidy>Deal; second set pre‑drums is “very HOT,” with an energetic post‑drums medley of Victim, Iko, and Corrina that kept the momentum high.
